item.title: Another conservative Pro Nazi group text leaked
item.description:
Does anybody think that they'll come to this realization and make any change? So far, for decades, they haven't.
Fp edit I know they won't come to any realization. Their whole entire party, for decades, has been predicated on racism. They're just finding boldness again as their death rattle erupts. Edit: This is another group chat. This is not the same as the Young Republicans. That's what makes this worse. And this comes as the White House is quite literally being torn down by the new fascist leader in America https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/oct/20/trump-nominee-paul-ingrassia-group-chats

item.title: Vintage Beauty : Pam Grier 80s
item.description:
Actress Pam Grier poses in a Native American headdress, 1980s. - Photo: Harry Langdon. She has Native American ancestry, as her mother was of Cheyenne indian descent. Grier herself has described her ancestry as a mix of African-American, Hispanic, Chinese, Filipino, and Cheyenne. Pics in good resolution (1320x1400)
Bonus picture : young Pamela Suzette Grier in the 70s.
item.dc:creator: Gippo53

1
2 Mine is!
3

18
19
20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @FLOOKO did this cool acrylic! Check out their other stuff too.
27 Man Tax: Sendhil Ramamurthy
“Worry never robs tomorrow of its sorrow, but only saps today of its strength.” - A.J. Cronin I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting only on that, also comment about something you DID like. Balance the negativity. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We're also setting up Jack Box game night and movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work and pretty destitute. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, you are the best. You've helped me so much. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me!
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Filth
item.description: This incident occurred on November 16, 2024. A 64-year-old woman, Alexandra Szustakiewicz, was arrested and charged with two felony hate crime counts and disorderly conduct after attacking a Palestinian-American couple at a Downers Grove Panera Bread. The incident, recorded on video and widely shared on Reddit, showed her verbally abusing and physically assaulting the couple, including attempting to throw hot coffee and hitting the man, over his "Free Palestine" sweatshirt. The confrontation, targeting the man and his pregnant wife, has fueled discussions on anti-Palestinian sentiment, with the couple facing both support and threats online. https://abc7chicago.com/post/alexandra-szustakiewicz-due-court-hate-crime-charges-alleged-ant-palestinian-incident-downers-grove-panera/15662572/
item.dc:creator: unwaver

item.title: Oklahoma rapist convicted but walks free
item.dc:creator: beenbannedb4

item.title: Karens amiright?
item.description: https://www.instagram.com/davidnihill Interesting side story. The name Nimrod In Hebrew, means "rebel", derived from the Semitic root word marad (to rebel). While the original biblical figure was described as a "mighty hunter". Nowadays Nimrod often is used to mean a foolish person. Daffy Duck is the reason for the words meaning changing. In an early Daffy Duck cartoon Bugs says about Elmer Fudd, "My little Nimrod". Daffy was sarcastically calling Elmer Fudd "My little mighty hunter", but many didn't know the meaning of the name, but based on the context that Daffy was clearly mocking Elmer, and likely the Nimrod to numbskull having similar tones, people perceive the words to mean, "My little foolish guy", and the name Nimrod gained a new meaning. Also a lot of people say it was Bugs Bunny who caused the meaning change, but it was Daffy. Bugs is the one who popularized cross dressing and furries, both as separate concepts, but also as a combined concept.
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: GovBrief Today #263
item.description: The pain is about to get very bad for a lot of people. Food benefits and Head Start programs are quickly running out of money. Pennsylvania already said they have no funding for SNAP in November. Federal employees are missing checks. Even the National Nuclear Security Administration is down to 400 people from 1,800, and funding for those 400 runs out this week. Meanwhile, Trump treats the world like a Risk board game. He told Ukraine they would have to give up territory for peace with Russia, threatened to "eradicate" Hamas 10 days after flying to the Middle East for a ceasefire, and is accelerating U.S. military attacks on boats in the Caribbean without proof of their wrongdoing. Flight attendants tell you to secure your own mask before helping others. Shore up your community, then we can move to the state level. That's the only way out of this. Find the community resources near you that need support, then show up. Don't let algorithms curate your reality either. Every night we offer raw evidence from local and national sources - images, data, quotes you can verify yourself in under 3 minutes. Free and private at govbrief.today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-nominee-racist-texts [2] https://go.govbrief.today/colombia-recalls-ambassador [3] https://go.govbrief.today/caribbean-no-crime-evidence [4] https://go.govbrief.today/us-australia-mineral-deal [5] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-ukraine-surrender-land [6] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-ceasefire-eradicate-hamas [7] https://go.govbrief.today/infectious-disease-meeting-skipped [8] https://go.govbrief.today/nc-redistricting-move-1stcd [9] https://go.govbrief.today/idaho-gov-reps-qatar [10] https://go.govbrief.today/portland-guard-can-deploy [11] https://go.govbrief.today/chicago-ice-border-patrol [12] https://go.govbrief.today/comey-motion-dismissal [13] https://go.govbrief.today/illinois-chicago-scotus-troops [14] https://go.govbrief.today/teens-arrested-coristine-attack [15] https://go.govbrief.today/head-start-funding-cuts [16] https://go.govbrief.today/most-schools-reject-trump [17] https://go.govbrief.today/snap-ebt-funding-shutdown [18] https://go.govbrief.today/interior-workforce-layoff-plan [19] https://go.govbrief.today/nuke-agency-workers-furloughed [20] https://go.govbrief.today/wh-east-wing-demolition [21] https://go.govbrief.today/military-book-ban-reversal Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Hey, Imgur. You and Reddit are the only 2 platforms I can pull this off on, but tell me if you want, and I'll put the headline link info directly below the image. So today, I would add 1-6 after the first, 7-14 after the second.
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: We have a vet visit tomorrow
item.description: I’m going to see the vet tomorrow to argue that Scooty’s visit three weeks ago was unnecessary. They got a urine sample of hers the week before that they screwed up by using the wrong plate and it corrupted the sample. They said they wouldn’t charge me for a re-sample but they still charged me $600. I’m going to argue that they would never have had to use the sedative or the amniocentesis the following Monday if they hadn’t screwed up the original sample that Thursday. I’m out of work thanks to the government shutdown so every dollar counts. Wish me luck
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays
